workspaceTab.accountHint: Switch accounts or organizations from the account menu.
workspaceTab.repoOwnerHint: Repository will be created under the selected GitHub owner. Use Manage GitHub to add another owner.
workspaceTab.githubOrgRepoHint: GitHub repository will use the GitHub connection configured for {{target}}.
workspaceTab.templateEmptyDesc: Create an empty workspace locally or with a connected storage backend.
workspaceTab.templateOpenbrainDesc: Create a server-backed OpenBrain cloud workspace.
workspaceTab.templateWikiDesc: Create an LLM Wiki workspace locally or with a connected storage backend.
workspaceTab.localOnlyDesc: Create a local workspace only. No remote storage backend will be used.
workspaceTab.errorSelectRepoOwner: Select a repository owner before creating this workspace.
